title: Presidential Press Release No. 002

summary: Official press release issued by the Presidential Communications Office of the Binod World Government.

title: Aira Velakku Thittam (Iron Lantern Scheme) — New Nation-Wide Safety Initiative
author: Office of the President
summary: Former President Adolfo's proposed Aira Velakku Thittam was unanimously approved at the 27th World Nations Assembly, with a Memorandum of Cooperation signed with Kasukabey. The scheme installs lighting in vulnerable areas nationwide to reduce nighttime hostile-mob threats (Creepers, Skeletons, Zombies), protecting citizens and infrastructure. President Rolex5834 has reaffirmed the policy.

title: Unified Binod Calendar (UBC) Officially Implemented
author: Ministry of Science and Astronomical Research
summary: Following five years of astronomical and chronometric research, the National Astronomical Observation Institute confirmed the calendar in use since the world's founding (23 April 2021) suffered systematic drift. With National Assembly approval and Presidential authorization, the Unified Binod Calendar (UBC) is now the Republic's sole official timekeeping system; prior records are preserved under the Old Calendar Records (OCR) designation, and all future government orders, laws, elections, treaties, and press releases must use UBC notation.
